items.title: HTA Sacks Admin Assistant, Reports Massive Housemen Scam To Police
items.summary: Tunku Azizah Hospital says it has sacked an admin assistant, a MyStep staff who allegedly scammed about 190 housemen out of over RM47,000, and filed a police report, stressing that collection of cash or payments to staff's personal accounts isn't allowed. The post HTA Sacks Admin Assistant, Reports Massive Housemen Scam To Police appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Restore 300L Monthly Fuel Subsidy Quota For Health Workers — MMA
items.summary: We recommend restoring the 300-litre monthly fuel subsidy quota, or implementing a specific exemption, for health care workers who are required to be physically present for duty in MOH. Policies must remain equitable and grounded in operational realities. The post Restore 300L Monthly Fuel Subsidy Quota For Health Workers — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Take Action Against Sale Of Non-Registered, Suspected Counterfeit Blood Pressure Monitors — MPS
items.summary: MPS notes reports indicating that non-registered or suspected counterfeit BPMs remain widely accessible. Based on a chain pharmacy's internal screening work last year, 10,081 devices were checked for accuracy; 31% were found to be not registered with MDA. The post Take Action Against Sale Of Non-Registered, Suspected Counterfeit Blood Pressure Monitors — MPS appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Schedule 7 Amendment: A Partial Fix That Should Not Be Misread — PMPASKL
items.summary: While the recent amendment introduces adjustments to GP consultation fees and selected areas, it is important to recognise that a substantial portion of Schedule 7 remains unchanged, like procedures, investigations, reports, and other components of care. The post Schedule 7 Amendment: A Partial Fix That Should Not Be Misread — PMPASKL appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: GP Fee Revision Impact Depends On TPA Arrangements — FPMPAM
items.summary: While the revised RM10 to RM80 GP fee range provides some flexibility, its real impact will depend on how it is implemented in practice, particularly within existing managed care and TPA arrangements, where pricing may not be fully market-driven. The post GP Fee Revision Impact Depends On TPA Arrangements — FPMPAM appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Growing Old In A Young Policy State
items.summary: Perhaps the most striking gap in Malaysia’s ageing policy is the absence of a coherent long-term care system. Families remain the primary caregivers for older persons. Meanwhile, the private nursing home sector has expanded rapidly. The post Growing Old In A Young Policy State appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Health Care Harder To Navigate Than Banking, Air Travel, Say ProtectHealth And Prudential
items.summary: Patients are confused over care pathways, costs, and access, as health care lags behind other industries in clarity and simplicity, say ProtectHealth and Prudential, citing delays in care and poor navigation. Medical costs change, unlike flight tickets. The post Health Care Harder To Navigate Than Banking, Air Travel, Say ProtectHealth And Prudential appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Admin Assistant Allegedly Scams Nearly 190 Housemen Out Of RM47,000 At HTA
items.summary: An admin assistant allegedly conned at least 187 housemen in Tunku Azizah Hospital’s paeds department out of over RM47,000 over 2.5 years since Sept 2023. Her two-prong scam: RM900 “refund” for “overpaid” emoluments and RM45 “fee” for a compulsory course. The post Admin Assistant Allegedly Scams Nearly 190 Housemen Out Of RM47,000 At HTA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: From Caregiver To Patient: A Nurse’s Call For Safer Chemotherapy Handling Practices — Parameswari Vadivalu
items.summary: Every nurse and health care worker deserves a safe working environment. Protecting those who care for others is not only a professional obligation but a moral imperative. The post From Caregiver To Patient: A Nurse’s Call For Safer Chemotherapy Handling Practices — Parameswari Vadivalu appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Long Overdue GP Fee Revision Strengthens Primary Care — MMA
items.summary: MMA will continue to advocate for a structured and consistent approach to future revisions, including better alignment across the system. The post Long Overdue GP Fee Revision Strengthens Primary Care — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .
